content.text:
Implemented the fix in `plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs`.

What changed:
- `resolveLatestTrackedTaskThread(...)` now scopes persisted job lookup to `CODEX_COMPANION_SESSION_ID` when present.
- Active task blocking now only considers tasks visible to the current Claude session.
- Fallback to `findLatestTaskThread(...)` is only used when there is no current Claude session id, matching the expected legacy/no-session behavior.

Validation:
- Added temporary regression tests reproducing both reported failures:
  - `--resume-last` resuming another session’s completed thread.
  - another session’s running task blocking `--resume-last`.
- Confirmed those tests failed before the fix and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test changes as requested.
- Re-ran focused existing runtime tests successfully.

Remaining working tree change:
- `plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs` only.
